Video.summary: Welcome to Week 1, Day 1 of the NCPA Indiana Regional 2025, live from The Pickler in Noblesville. This crucial Collegiate Team Match features the University of Wisconsin Madison battling a developing Purdue University squad. This match is pool play for seeding, with teams competing for one of eight bids to the National Championship and a share of the $5,000 prize money.
Video.title: NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Team Match - University of Wisconsin Madison vs. Purdue University

Image.alt: NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Team Match - University of Wisconsin Madison vs. Purdue University
NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Team Match - University of Wisconsin Madison vs. Purdue University
NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Team Match - University of Wisconsin Madison vs. Purdue University

Video.summary: Karin Kockis and Spencer Moorman compete in the Gold Medal match for Women's Senior Pro at the 2024 Us Open Pickleball Championship.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro - Gold Medal Match

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro - Gold Medal Match
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro - Gold Medal Match
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro - Gold Medal Match

Video.summary: The World Pickleball League Season 2 returns to the Jio World Garden in Mumbai for an electrifying Tie 8 showdown. The defending champions, Bengaluru Jawans—led by coach Oliver Strecker and backed by owners Atlee and Priya—return to the court for the first time since their dominant opening night performance. They face a determined Delhi Dilwale squad, coached by Wesley Gabrielsson, who are looking to climb the standings after a hard-fought tie-break victory in their previous outing.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Delhi - Day 4 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Delhi - Day 4 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Delhi - Day 4 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Delhi - Day 4 Tie 2

Video.summary: Parris Todd and Judit Castillo Gargallo face off in the 2023 US Open Women’s Pro Singles Gold Medal Match. A high-stakes showdown of rising stars, intense rallies, and top-tier shotmaking.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Singles Gold Medal – Parris Todd vs Judit Castillo Gargallo

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Singles Gold Medal – Parris Todd vs Judit Castillo Gargallo
US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Singles Gold Medal – Parris Todd vs Judit Castillo Gargallo
US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Singles Gold Medal – Parris Todd vs Judit Castillo Gargallo

Video.summary: Watch Nathalie Bagby and Beth Bellamy compete against Eva Welsher and Angela Simon for the gold in this Women's Senior Pro Doubles Gold Medal match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Gold Medal

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Gold Medal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Gold Medal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Gold Medal

Video.summary: Don’t miss this inspiring wheelchair hybrid doubles match from the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships. Adaptive athletes Rob Krizmanich, Michael Lipp, Patick Huletsky, and Jeff Sylvestre bring talent, teamwork, and tenacity to the court in a showcase of the sport’s inclusive future.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Wheelchair Hybrid Doubles 5.0 Gold Match – Krizmanich & Lipp vs Huletsky & Sylvestre

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Wheelchair Hybrid Doubles 5.0 Gold Match – Krizmanich & Lipp vs Huletsky & Sylvestre
US Open 2023 – Wheelchair Hybrid Doubles 5.0 Gold Match – Krizmanich & Lipp vs Huletsky & Sylvestre
US Open 2023 – Wheelchair Hybrid Doubles 5.0 Gold Match – Krizmanich & Lipp vs Huletsky & Sylvestre

Video.summary: November 21, 2023 - Welcome to week 9 - season 2 of The Arizona Pickleball League! It's Tuesday Night Pickleball @ The Orchard, and the Tempe Tornadoes face-off against the Peoria Pythons.
Video.title: November 21, 2023 - AZ PBL

Image.alt: November 21, 2023 - AZ PBL
November 21, 2023 - AZ PBL
November 21, 2023 - AZ PBL

Video.summary: The stakes reach a boiling point at Mumbai's Jio World Garden as the league-leading Chennai Super Champs face off against the defending champions, the Bengaluru Jawans, in a critical top-of-the-table clash. Witness a masterclass in professional grit as "dominating" stars like Katrina Stewart and tactical veterans like Dusty Boyer battle for supremacy on the road to the semi-finals. From high-velocity "scary" 15-minute singles sprints to intense mixed doubles rallies, every point contributes to the prestigious Band of Honor leaderboard. Experience the strategic drama of game-changing "Pickle Plays" and high-stakes challenges in a tie where one momentum shift could decide who walks away with the top spot in the league.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1

Video.summary: Sheri Courter and Mari Humberg take on Martina Frantova and Christine Karges in this Women’s Split Pro Doubles Semifinal match at the 2024 US Open Pickleball Championships. With fast-paced exchanges, sharp angles, and tactical precision, both teams battle for a spot in the finals on the prestigious Zing Zang Championship Court in Naples, Florida. This high-stakes match features standout teamwork and thrilling rallies from some of the sport’s most skilled competitors.
Video.title: US Open 2024 – Women’s Split Pro Doubles Semifinal – Courter & Humberg vs Frantova & Karges

Image.alt: US Open 2024 – Women’s Split Pro Doubles Semifinal – Courter & Humberg vs Frantova & Karges
US Open 2024 – Women’s Split Pro Doubles Semifinal – Courter & Humberg vs Frantova & Karges
US Open 2024 – Women’s Split Pro Doubles Semifinal – Courter & Humberg vs Frantova & Karges

Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Men's Split Pro - Backdraw Semifinal

Image.alt: Taylor Lautner and David Dobrik
Taylor Lautner and David Dobrik
Taylor Lautner and David Dobrik

Video.summary: Welcome to Championship Sunday at the NCPA Utah Regional 2025. This Round of 16 Collegiate Team Match pits the 5th-seeded Utah Tech against the 12th-seeded, but formidable, Utah State squad. The action takes place at Club Pickleball USA in Orem, Utah. Both teams are competing for a coveted bid to the National Championship in Saint Louis, Missouri, which features a $30,000 prize pool.
Video.title: NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 1 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State

Image.alt: NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 1 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State
NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 1 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State
NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 1 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State

Video.summary: We are live in sunny San Diego for Week 3 of the NCPA San Diego Regional 2025. This high-stakes collegiate team match features the University of San Diego (USD) battling Grand Canyon University (GCU) in a best-of-seven series.The action includes intense Men's Doubles , Women's Singles , and Mixed Doubles as these teams compete for regional dominance. Watch top talent, including GCU's lefty powerhouse Adam Jones, who boasts a strong 5.6 singles rating , and his partner Xavier Cook Nakakuki. On the USD side, the episode highlights the partnership of Marcus Hopkins and Ryan, an impressive grad student player with high doubles ratings. USD’s Bella also shows grit in the women's singles match. This broadcast captures the best of college pickleball in an amazing format.
Video.title: NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - USD vs. GCU

Image.alt: NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - USD vs. GCU
NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - USD vs. GCU
NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - USD vs. GCU

Video.summary: The Naples JBB United face off against the Boca Raton Picklers in a women's match.
Video.title: NPL - JBB United vs Picklers (Mens)

Image.alt: NPL - JBB United vs Picklers (Mens)
NPL - JBB United vs Picklers (Mens)
NPL - JBB United vs Picklers (Mens)

Video.summary: In this Men’s Doubles Open Group C clash, Tom Turney and Sam Chajul take on Jamie Basford and Peter Hitchman. Watch as smart defense, aggressive drives, and well-timed net play define this intense showdown at the 2023 English Nationals. A standout match that reflects the growing depth of talent in British pickleball.
Video.title: English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Group C – Turney & Chajul vs Basford & Hitchman

Image.alt: English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Group C – Turney & Chajul vs Basford & Hitchman
English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Group C – Turney & Chajul vs Basford & Hitchman
English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Group C – Turney & Chajul vs Basford & Hitchman

Video.summary: Jack Munro of Texas faces Virginia’s David Bieger in the 2024 DUPR National Championship Men’s Singles Final, showcasing skill, power, and precision in elite collegiate pickleball.
Video.title: Men's Doubles Final - Virginia vs. Texas

Image.alt: Men's Doubles Final - Virginia vs. Texas
Men's Doubles Final - Virginia vs. Texas
Men's Doubles Final - Virginia vs. Texas

Video.summary: In this Pro Men's Doubles match from the 2025 Minto U.S. Open Pickleball Championships in Naples, Florida, the team of Yates and Sobex faces off against Yu and Zwiren. The match is characterized by powerful shots, strategic dinks, and a high-energy atmosphere on the custom-designed Championship court. Commentary highlights the players' transition from singles to doubles and features details about one of the players, Thomas Yu, who previously played tennis at Johns Hopkins University.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Yates/Sobex vs. Yu/Zwiren

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Yates/Sobex vs. Yu/Zwiren
US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Yates/Sobex vs. Yu/Zwiren
US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Yates/Sobex vs. Yu/Zwiren

Video.summary: Watch as the formidable mother-daughter duo, Lee and Anna Leigh Waters, take on challengers from North Carolina in this Pro Women's Doubles match from the US National Pickleball Center. After an injury, it is great to see the champions partner up again, demonstrating the "fire and ice" style of play that has made them national champions. While the Waters team's game one was a quick 11-point victory, the challengers, Fuzesi and Maloof, handled themselves well on the championship court. The players at home can learn from Anna Leigh's "instigator" shots and two-handed backhand rolls, which she helped bring to the big stage.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Fuzesi/Maalouf

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Fuzesi/Maalouf
US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Fuzesi/Maalouf
US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Fuzesi/Maalouf

Video.summary: The 2025 European Pickleball Championships in Rome, Italy, hosts the high-stakes Women's Doubles Open Final featuring Team England against Team Spain. Defending champions Spain, represented by the powerhouse duo of Sabrina Mendez and Glauka Carvajal, look to secure their second consecutive title against the English pair of Thaddea Lock and Katy Morris.
Video.title: Women's Doubles Open Final - Lock/Morris vs. Mendez/Carvajal

Image.alt: Women's Doubles Open Final - Lock/Morris vs. Mendez/Carvajal
Women's Doubles Open Final - Lock/Morris vs. Mendez/Carvajal
Women's Doubles Open Final - Lock/Morris vs. Mendez/Carvajal

Video.summary: Witness one of the most exciting finals from the European Pickleball Championships 2025 in Rome. In the Women's Senior Singles Open Final, Team England’s Anna Linton takes on Team Italy’s Paola Tampieri at the iconic Stadio dei Marmi. Linton starts with commanding form, dominating the first game with powerful forehand drives. However, the momentum shifts as Tampieri, fueled by a passionate home crowd, adjusts her strategy to target Linton’s backhand and level the match.
Video.title: Women's Senior Singles Final - Linton vs. Tampieri

Image.alt: Women's Senior Singles Final - Linton vs. Tampieri
Women's Senior Singles Final - Linton vs. Tampieri
Women's Senior Singles Final - Linton vs. Tampieri
